title: CraftSpire
description: Craftspire is a creativity-driven multiplayer modpack focused on immersive building, exploration, and playing with friends!
body:
🛠️ What it adds:
Craftspire features a variety of biome-expanding mods like Terralith and Biomes O’ Plenty, decorative building mods (MCW, Chipped, Handcrafted), farming and cooking systems (Farmer’s Delight, Croptopia), and optional technical progression through Create. It’s designed to foster creativity, large-scale projects, exploration, and community-driven survival worlds.

🌟 Why download it:
If you’ve ever wanted a modpack that encourages stunning builds, collaborative town-making, immersive survival adventures, and a world that feels alive and personal—Craftspire is for you. Whether you’re a solo builder or part of a creative multiplayer community, this pack offers the tools and inspiration to thrive.

⚠️ Before you download:
	•	This modpack uses Fabric and Modrinth dependencies only — no CurseForge mods included.
	•	Multiplayer-friendly* when you host it and share your world with friends and highly configurable.
	•	Shaders or textures are included by default, but it’s fully compatible with Iris + Sodium + most aesthetic packs.
	•	You’ll need Java 17+ and ~6-8 GB of RAM for smooth gameplay.
